curation_notes: The patch commit changed 3 non-test source files (Screen.php, Layout.php, Repository.php) plus a config file. The core fix is in extractState() which replaced unserialize() with Crypt::decrypt(), and serializableState() which replaced serialize(new SerializableClosure(...)) with Crypt::encrypt(). The vulnerability location was derived from the patch diff: the _state parameter deserialization in extractState() is the entry point for the insecure deserialization.
